summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/11/2023
DCE iron ore futures market falling sharply trends by 2.61%. the main contract I2401 closed 951. Some traders adopt separatequotations, Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand.
